task_objective: Fix Updater Post-Install Stale Check State / Invalidate stale post-install check cache
design_decisions: Introduced `last_checked_version` cache field to tracking backend check versions. Bypassed update check caching if requested version doesn't match the cached check version. Added cache invalidation logic inside `clear_stale_update_check_cache` invoked when installation requests, handoff confirmation, promotion or clear occurs. Aligned frontend `checkForUpdates` early guard to check `effectiveCurrentVersion`.
results: All backend and frontend tests passed successfully. All validation checks passed, and Codex review verified zero correctness issues. Git commit pushed on active branch.
